input.question: Which professors give the lowest average grades (strictest graders)?

payload.question: Which professors give the lowest average grades (strictest graders)?

output.sql:
WITH avg_by_prof AS (
  SELECT
    professor_id AS professor_id,
    professor_name AS professor_name,
    AVG(grade) AS avg_grade,
    COUNT(*) AS grade_count,
    -AVG(grade) AS avg_grade_inv
  FROM grades
  GROUP BY professor_id, professor_name
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
)
SELECT
  professor_id AS professor_id,
  professor_name AS professor_name,
  avg_grade AS avg_grade,
  grade_count AS grade_count,
  avg_grade_inv AS avg_grade_inv
FROM avg_by_prof
ORDER BY avg_grade_inv DESC
LIMIT 10;

visualization.description: Top 10 professors with the lowest average grades (strictest graders).
visualization.title: Professors with Lowest Average Grades (Strictest Graders)

payload.sql:
WITH avg_by_prof AS (
  SELECT
    professor_id AS professor_id,
    professor_name AS professor_name,
    AVG(grade) AS avg_grade,
    COUNT(*) AS grade_count,
    -AVG(grade) AS avg_grade_inv
  FROM grades
  GROUP BY professor_id, professor_name
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
)
SELECT
  professor_id AS professor_id,
  professor_name AS professor_name,
  avg_grade AS avg_grade,
  grade_count AS grade_count,
  avg_grade_inv AS avg_grade_inv
FROM avg_by_prof
ORDER BY avg_grade_inv DESC
LIMIT 10;
